item.title: Carl Zeiss Meditec AG: Zeiss Intrabeam Spherical Applicator 1.5 cm REF:304534-6000-557 Recall
item.product: Zeiss Intrabeam Spherical Applicator 1.5 cm REF:304534-6000-557
item.summary: Spherical applicators (radiation therapy accessory) failed to meet manufacturing specifications. Product details: Zeiss Intrabeam Spherical Applicator 1.5 cm REF:304534-6000-557
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution in the state and territories of Florida and Puerto Rico. The countries of China, Germany, Ecuador, Spain, France, Malaysia, Philippines, Poland, and Romania.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
